tagline: Work with Help Scout Inbox API operations safely.

groups.title: Bounded JSON direct reads
commands: reports conversations volume by channel get
reports productivity first response time get

global_flags.name: connection
global_flags.summary: Use a saved Help Scout connector credential.

global_flags.name: preview
global_flags.summary: Preview a reverse-ETL write plan without executing it.

global_flags.name: confirm
global_flags.summary: Typed confirmation required for destructive/sensitive Help Scout write execution.

commands.summary: List Help Scout conversations as an ETL stream.

flags.name: modified-since
flags.summary: Lower bound for modified conversations; maps to the connector start_date config.

examples: pm help-scout conversation list --connection help-scout-prod --json

commands.summary: List Help Scout customers as an ETL stream.

flags.name: modified-since
flags.summary: Lower bound for modified customers; maps to the connector start_date config.

examples: pm help-scout customer list --connection help-scout-prod --json

commands.summary: List Help Scout mailboxes as an ETL stream.
examples: pm help-scout mailbox list --connection help-scout-prod --json

commands.summary: List Help Scout users as an ETL stream.
examples: pm help-scout user list --connection help-scout-prod --json

commands.risk: Binary/raw message retrieval is bounded by operation metadata and remains feature-gated until binary execution policy is enabled.
commands.notes: Operation-backed binary command; no raw unbounded download is exposed.

examples: pm help-scout conversations attachments data get --connection help-scout-prod --json

commands.summary: Get Thread Original Source / Get Thread Original Source (RFC 822)
commands.risk: Binary/raw message retrieval is bounded by operation metadata and remains feature-gated until binary execution policy is enabled.
commands.notes: Operation-backed binary command; no raw unbounded download is exposed.

help_topics.name: binary
help_topics.summary: Binary/raw payload endpoints are bounded operation metadata and are not exposed as unbounded downloads.
